zstdnet.share_to_lan.port_help: Zstd port uses the configured port first; if it is occupied, an available port is selected. Leave the game port empty to use this LAN session's actual port
zstdnet.share_to_lan.backend_port_auto: Auto: use this LAN session port
zstdnet.share_to_lan.port_invalid: Zstd port must be between 1024 and 65535
zstdnet.share_to_lan.port_unavailable: Zstd port is already in use
zstdnet.share_to_lan.write_failed: Failed to update zstdnet-server.properties before opening LAN.
zstdnet.singleplayer.lan_hint: ZstdNet is ready: open your world to LAN directly. The Zstd port uses the configured port first, falls back to an available port on conflict, and follows this session's game port.
zstdnet.singleplayer.lan_command_hint: Use /zstdport zstd <port> only when you need a fixed public/tunnel port; if another LAN mod fully replaces the UI, use /zstdport show to view current ports.
zstdnet.singleplayer.lan_ready: ZstdNet LAN is ready: Zstd port %s, game port %s. Point your tunnel or friends to the Zstd port.
zstdnet.singleplayer.lan_ready.copy_zstd: Click to copy the Zstd port
zstdnet.hud.host.title: ZstdNet (minekuai.com) Host %s %s:%s
zstdnet.hud.client.title: ZstdNet (minekuai.com) %s %s:%s
zstdnet.command.port.status: Current zstd port: %s, backend game port: %s.
zstdnet.command.port.no_permission: Only the local host with admin permission can change ZstdNet ports.
zstdnet.command.port.game_set_reopen: Set backend game port to %s. The world is already published to LAN, so reopen LAN for the change to fully take effect.
zstdnet.command.port.voice_status: Current voice public entry: %s, backend voice port: %s.
zstdnet.fallback.notice: ZstdNet: server %s does not run ZstdNet; joined over a plain direct connection (this session is uncompressed).
zstdnet.fallback.relay_notice: ZstdNet: tunnel node %s (SakuraFrp/OpenFrp etc.) does not answer ZSTD — it likely maps a vanilla LAN port; joined over a plain direct connection (this session is uncompressed).
zstdnet.fallback.hint: If the server does have ZstdNet, make sure you are connecting to its Zstd proxy port. Set raw_fallback=false in zstdnet-client.toml to force compression again.
zstdnet.command.voice.no_permission: Only the local host with admin permission can change ZstdNet config.
